topIngredients.name: Peptide Complex
topIngredients.benefit: Signals skin cells to produce more collagen over time

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Plumps fine lines with immediate hydration

topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Improves circulation under the eyes to reduce dark circles

verdict: The Ordinary Multi-Peptide Eye Serum brings science-backed peptide technology to a budget price. The concentration is lower than the brand's standalone peptide serums but provides meaningful eye-area support.
